title: catabrosella humilis subsp. parviflora
intro: Catabrosella humilis subsp. parviflora, also known as parviflora catabrosella, is a plant species in the catabrosella genus that belongs to the family Scrophulariaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues and menstrual cramps. The health benefits of Catabrosella humilis subsp. parviflora include its ability to relieve congestion, soothe digestive problems, and calm anxiety. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
